# Mandiant (Google)

## RSA 2026

Mandiant (Google Cloud Security) is a Platinum Sponsor at RSA Conference 2026. While a specific booth number for Mandiant was not explicitly found, as a Platinum Sponsor, Google Cloud Security will have a significant presence, and Mandiant's offerings would be showcased within that larger footprint. The conference, running from March 23-26, 2026, at the Moscone Center in San Francisco, is heavily focused on how AI is accelerating both cyber risk and cyber defense. [cite: 19,
